creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Hiroki Tagato from comment #1)
> There is a patch (for www/npm) proposed in bug 266159 and I hope it will solve
> the problem (though I have not tried myself yet).
Ah stupid, should have checked on npm PRs first ;) Yes, I can confirm it fixes *this* problem, my build just got past that point!
